Class AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdopterBasedMatchingService
public class AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl extends Object implements AdopterBasedMatchingService
Default implementation of AdopterBasedMatchingService that aggregates scores from a configurable list of matching strategies to rank animals for a given adopter. Each applicable strategy contributes a normalized score in [0.0, 1.0]. A priority profile can give ranked criteria stronger influence, while unranked applicable criteria still count with normal influence. Criteria that are not applicable do not count.

    List<MatchResult>
    match(Adopter adopter, List<Animal> animals)
    Evaluates each animal in the provided list against the adopter's preferences and returns a ranked list of match results ordered from highest to lowest score.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl

      public AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl(List<IMatchingStrategy> strategies)
      Constructs an AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl with the given list of strategies. The strategies are applied in the order provided; the list must not be null or empty.
      Parameters:
      strategies - the matching strategies to apply; must not be null or empty
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if strategies is null or empty

    • AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl

      public AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl(List<IMatchingStrategy> strategies, MatchingPreferencesProfile profile)
      Constructs an AdopterBasedMatchingServiceImpl with strategies and a priority profile. The profile may be null; in that case every applicable strategy uses normal weight.
      Parameters:
      strategies - the matching strategies to apply; must not be null or empty
      profile - the optional ranked preference profile
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if strategies is null or empty

  • Method Details

    • match

      public List<MatchResult> match(Adopter adopter, List<Animal> animals)
      Evaluates each animal in the provided list against the adopter's preferences and returns a ranked list of match results ordered from highest to lowest score. Animals with no compatibility with the adopter's preferences may still appear in the result with a score of zero. Scores each animal using applicable strategy contributions, then sorts results descending by score. Animals with a score of zero are included in the result.
      Specified by:
      match in interface AdopterBasedMatchingService
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to match against
      animals - the pool of animals to evaluate
      Returns:
      a list of MatchResult objects sorted by descending score
